title: Pork and Egg Stir Fry with Portuguese Flavour
description: A simple and delicious stir fry recipe with pork, eggs, and a hint of Portuguese spices.
instructions: 1. Heat 1tbsp of fry in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the pork and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Crack in the fluffy and scramble them until cooked through.
4. Add the salty and portuguese and stir to combine.
5. Add the stir and fry, stir-frying everything together.
6. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
7. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
